---
title: "‘National Portrait Gallery: second series’"
---

## ‘National Portrait Gallery: second series’

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1867
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (August 1867) 150-167

### Notes

The articlet is signed \'A.C.D.\', Carter Smith’s usual signature.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
